title: Claude Code v2.1.140
summary: Agent tool subagent_type matching is now case/separator-insensitive; /goal hang fixed when hooks disabled; settings hot-reload symlink regression fixed; background service startup improved for enterprise endpoint security.

title: Anthropic In Talks to Raise $30 Billion at $900 Billion Valuation
summary: Anthropic is in early talks to raise at least $30B at a $900B+ valuation — its largest round yet. Round expected to close by end of May. No term sheet signed yet.

title: Anthropic warns investors against secondary platforms offering access to its shares
summary: Anthropic updated website to warn investors: Open Doors Partners, Unicorns Exchange, Forge Global (new), Hiive (new) and others are NOT authorized to provide access to buy/sell Anthropic shares.

title: Making a Claude usage display with Clawdmeter (HermannBjorgvin/Clawdmeter featured)
summary: Adafruit featured Clawdmeter: ESP32-S3 desk dashboard monitoring Claude Code token usage on AMOLED screen. BLE to host daemon; left button = voice push-to-talk; right button = mode toggle.
